description: Reroll any one die — discard its current value and roll it again within its face range.
Add 1 to any rolled die's value. Cannot exceed the die's maximum face.
Subtract 1 from any rolled die's value. Cannot go below 1.
Add 2 to any rolled die's value. Cannot exceed the die's maximum face.
Subtract 2 from any rolled die's value. Cannot go below 1.
Reroll every die in hand — each die discards its current value and rolls again.
Roll 1 mundane d4
Apply lesser 1 or greater 1 to any die
Flip a cosmic coin (1d2)
Apply lesser 2 to any 1 cosmic die
Roll 1 diabolic d20
Apply greater 2 to any 1 diabolic die
Apply x2 to any 1 diabolic die
Apply greater 1 to any 1 diabolic die
Seal the highest open tab — no dice required. Cannot use when only one tab remains.
Seal the lowest open tab — no dice required. Cannot use when only one tab remains.
Double a rolled die's value — capped at its max face.
Triple a rolled die's value — capped at its max face.
Set a rolled die to its maximum face value.
Set a rolled die to 1.
Reroll one die and keep whichever result is higher.
Remove one rolled die from this round — its value no longer counts toward sealing.
